subcodes.first_line: O friends of the heart and soul of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The illustrious letter from those divine beloved ones was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران دل و جان عبدالبهاء نامهای نامی آنعزیزان ربانی ملاحظه گردید و مطرب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
